prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia repeatedly sends small index request letters to a search engine gate. After many attempts, the gate opens and a small sign says "已收录". Nearby are tiny tools labeled "robots" and "sitemap".

Core meaning: after many indexing requests and technical tweaks, the blog was finally included in search.

Style: clean humorous Chinese technical illustration, black/red/white, small blue search glow. Minimal labels: "索引", "robots", "已收录".

Avoid real Bing logo, avoid dense SEO chart.
